channel.title: FreelanceOS Blog
channel.description: Guides, tips, and free templates for managing your freelance business and content workflow in Notion.

item.title: FreelanceOS vs Easlo Freelance OS: Which Notion Template Is Right for You? (2026)
item.description: An honest comparison of FreelanceOS and Easlo Freelance OS — pricing, features, and who each template is best for.

item.title: How to Manage Your Freelance Business in Notion (Free Template)
item.description: Learn how to set up a complete freelance business system in Notion. Free template included.

item.title: How to Organize Your Content Calendar in Notion (Free Template)
item.description: A step-by-step guide to building a content calendar in Notion. Free template included.

item.title: Best Notion Templates for Small Business Owners (2026 Guide)
item.description: The best Notion templates for small business owners in 2026. Free and premium compared.
